name: agent-specs
description: Shareable Claude Code plugins for spec-driven engineering workflows.

plugins.name: spec-kit
plugins.description: The spec phase of an AI SDLC as one plugin: product spec -> technical spec + hard/soft constraints -> up-front acceptance plan + test-first build plan, linked by a PR-* traceability spine. Works greenfield or feature-addition. Invoke any architect agent, do a full run, or publish the plans to Linear/Jira.
